title: 叙事的反身性循环
brief: A cyclic diagram showing five stages in a loop: '高估值→市场相信叙事' → '人才加入、资源涌入' → '技术取得进展' → '叙事更可信' → '估值更高' with arrows connecting them in a cycle. Style: soft-tech-diagram, clean, with subtle dashed containers, bilingual labels. Landscape.
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled '叙事的反身性循环'. Diagram type: article illustration. Use a soft technical diagram, subtle dashed containers, layered modules, light academic visual language. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
A cyclic diagram showing five stages in a loop: '高估值→市场相信叙事' → '人才加入、资源涌入' → '技术取得进展' → '叙事更可信' → '估值更高' with arrows connecting them in a cycle. Style: soft-tech-diagram, clean, with subtle dashed containers, bilingual labels. Landscape.
